name: German Macaroni Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the mushrooms, reserving the liquid. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to make a total of 1 cup.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, fry the bacon until it is crisp. Drain the bacon and reserve the drippings. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. In the same saucepan, combine sugar, flour, salt, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper. Blend these into the drippings.
4. Add vinegar and the reserved liquid to the saucepan. Stir until thick and bubbly.
5. Cook the macaroni, then toss with the dressing and other ingredients (chopped green onion and celery).
